scene: A doodle physicist at a lunch table with sandwiches, a name card reading ENRICO FERMI, hand-lettered 1950. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
Fermi mid-bite with a lightbulb popping over his head, colleagues chatting. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A vast empty starfield with huge hand-lettered caps WHERE IS EVERYBODY? Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A doorbell on a cartoon Earth covered in cobwebs, untouched, big black caps NOBODY SHOWED UP. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
A glowing scroll of answers with the bottom one glowing red, big black caps THE HUMBLING ANSWER. Flat dark navy sky with simple white star dots. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
